query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
ASK {
  ?brooke wdt:P27 wd:Q30 .
  ?colin wdt:P27 wd:Q30 .
  ?brooke wdt:P19 ?location1 .
  ?colin wdt:P19 ?location2 .
  FILTER (?location1 = ?location2) .
  ?brooke wdt:P734 "Brooke Raboutou" .
  ?colin wdt:P734 "Colin Duffy" .
}

question.string: can i play don't starve on play station 4?
How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?uri) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?uri wdt:P31 wd:Q87004793 .
  ?uri wdt:P166 ?date .
  ?brezhnev wdt:P569 ?brezhnevBirthDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) < YEAR(?brezhnevBirthDate))
}

question.string: How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?president wdt:P39 wd:Q17985087 .
  ?president wdt:P580 ?startDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?startDate) > 1990)
}

question.string: Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
ASK {
  ?kobe wdt:P54 wd:Q121783 .
  ?lebron wdt:P54 wd:Q121783 .
  ?kobe wdt:P577 ?kobedate .
  ?lebron wdt:P577 ?lebrondate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?kobedate) < YEAR(?lebrondate)) .
  FILTER(?kobe = wd:Q25369) .
  FILTER(?lebron = wd:Q36159) .
}

Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?verb ?lemma
WHERE {
  ?verb wdt:P31 wd:Q24905 .
  ?verb wdt:P105 ?lemma .
  FILTER(STRENDS(?lemma, "uş"))
}

question.string: From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190489 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: How high is the Cologne Cathedral ?
How is the Harz called in Mandarin Chinese?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?label
WHERE {
  wd:Q4186 wdt:P1705 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1705 ?label .
  ?statement pq:P407 wd:Q727694 .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?label), "zh-cn"))
}

How many countries have mountains whose peaks are higher than 2000m above sea level?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?mountain wdt:P31 wd:Q8502 .
  ?mountain wdt:P2044 ?elevation .
  FILTER (?elevation > 2000) .
  ?mountain wdt:P4552|wdt:P361 ?range .
  ?range wdt:P361|wdt:P1424 ?country .
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
}

}
